name: Supply
summary: Moving a load of materials or finished products from its creation point to where it will be used.
escort: Armed depending on the army's Force quality; Force:1 might have a smattering of Minion-level troops, while Force:5 armies defend with a full force of Minibosses and Minions.

completionOptions.name: Fortify Stronghold
completionOptions.description: Select a Fortification from a non-active faction and add it to your forces until the start of the next STRATCOM phase.

completionOptions.name: Unit Drills
completionOptions.description: Write which detachment is being trained and where they are garrisoned. Choose one: +1 Speed, +1 damage on all attacks, or add Pin, Bleed, or Slow to one attack. Reveal at the start of the next TACCOM at that location.

completionOptions.name: Research Project
completionOptions.description: Select a Research Project from the research list.

name: Support
summary: These convoys carry weapons, troops, slaves, and other support materials to and from locations. The most valuable convoys a demon lord can send out.
escort: Heavily defended with at least two minibosses and a full array of minions regardless of the army's current Force value.

completionOptions.name: Unit Drills
completionOptions.description: Write which detachment is being trained and where they are garrisoned. Choose one: +1 Speed, +1 damage on all attacks, or add Pin, Bleed, or Slow to one attack. Reveal at the start of the next TACCOM at that location.

completionOptions.name: Research Project
completionOptions.description: Select a Research Project from the research list.

name: Assault
summary: A convoy aimed at retaking lost territory, or attacking opposing forces.
escort: Contents depend on the faction's Force value, but likely includes several minibosses and a full division of minions. Might even have a Faction Leader involved.

completionOptions.name: Trigger TACCOM or Force roll
completionOptions.description: When it arrives, either trigger a TACCOM scene with player characters, or roll Force to see if it succeeds. If this targets another faction, make it an opposed roll.

name: Diplomatic
summary: A convoy carrying an important diplomat, vital commander, or other VIPs. One of the few that often move between other demons' territory.

completionOptions.name: Research Project
completionOptions.description: Select a Research Project from the research list.

completionOptions.name: Infernal Mass
completionOptions.description: Write where the ritual is performed and define its intention, duration, needs, and weaknesses. Small, local, contained rituals are quicker, cheaper, and more vulnerable than global, unrestrained ones.

name: Decoy
summary: Decoy convoys do nothing themselves. Their purpose is to mislead and misdirect players, confuse them, and lead them into traps.
escort: Almost always have either zero defenses, or an overwhelming force of minions, minibosses, and more.

completionOptions.name: Misdirection
completionOptions.description: No mechanical completion reward. Use to deliver plot information, hint at upcoming assaults, play with NPCs, or spring traps. Always be sure a Decoy is not a waste of time for the table.
